$comment: BecomeChampion Rules Pack - T'au Empire (10th Edition). Generated from 10e CSV data. Includes core T'au detachments and datasheets from the T'au Empire faction pack and Forge World sources; not official rules text.
author: Community
source_note: Generated from current 10e CSV exports. This pack includes T'au Empire detachments Kauyon, Mont'ka, Retaliation Cadre, Kroot Hunting Pack, Auxiliary Cadre, Experimental Prototype Cadre. Boarding Actions detachments are intentionally excluded. Rules text is extracted and normalized for in-app prompting; check official publications for authoritative wording.

abilities.name: Inspirational Defiance
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Martial Warrior
abilities.timing: Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to be active while resolving those atta
abilities.summary:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to be active while resolving those attacks:
- Direct Grace: Fidelity has the [PRECISION] ability.
- Forceful Strike: Fidelity has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
- Whirling Stance: Fidelity has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead of [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

abilities.name: Duality Shield
abilities.timing: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase,
abilities.summary: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Paradox of Duality
abilities.timing: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
abilities.summary: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Loyalty (Aura)
abilities.timing: Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test
abilities.summary: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Titan Hunter
abilities.timing: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within
abilities.summary: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within half range.

abilities.summary: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.timing: In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, its Fire Warrior Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret missile system weapon
abilities.summary:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, its Fire Warrior Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret missile system weapon.
Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.summary: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Jammer Array
abilities.timing: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.
abilities.summary: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Rapid Deployment
abilities.timing: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that
abilities.summary: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abilities.name: Sentinel Protocols
abilities.timing: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+
abilities.summary: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.timing: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking un
abilities.summary: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION , that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so
abilities.summary:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Hover Drone
abilities.timing: The bearer can FLY and has a Move characteristic of 10".
abilities.summary: The bearer can FLY and has a Move characteristic of 10".

abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.timing: At the end of your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP
abilities.summary: At the end of your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Precise Targeting
abilities.timing: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.summary: The bearer is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back but it loses the SMOKE keyword.

abilities.name: Stealth Drones
abilities.timing: Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that att
abilities.summary:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Loping Stride
abilities.timing: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Mo
abilities.summary: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Baggage Harness (Aura)
abilities.timing: While a friendly Kroot unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAIN
abilities.summary: While a friendly Kroot unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Hooked
abilities.timing: Each time the bearer makes an attack with this weapon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, if a hit is scored, until
abilities.summary: Each time the bearer makes an attack with this weapon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, if a hit is scored, until the end of the turn, if the bearer selects that unit as a target of a charge, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer.

abilities.timing: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE , add 1 to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE , add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Targeting Array

abilities.summary: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.timing: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.
abilities.summary: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.name: Drone Escort
abilities.timing: in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it
abilities.summary: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Markerlight
abilities.timing: The bearer has the Markerlight keyword.
abilities.summary: The bearer has the Markerlight keyword.

abilities.name: Thunderous Pounce
abilities.timing: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Knarloc beak and talons equipped by models in this un
abilities.summary: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Knarloc beak and talons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Fieldcraft
abilities.timing: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn
abilities.summary: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Pech’ra
abilities.timing: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
abilities.summary: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Bounty Hunters
abilities.timing: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack th
abilities.summary: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Rites of Feasting
abilities.timing: Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

abilities.name: Loping Pounce
abilities.timing: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Kroot Infantry units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced
abilities.summary: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Kroot Infantry units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.timing: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Kroot Character models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1
abilities.summary: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Kroot Character models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abilities.name: Advanced Scouting
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another Kroot m
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another Kroot model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Trail Finding
abilities.timing: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model’s unit, if this model
abilities.summary: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Kroot Ambush
abilities.timing: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly Kroot unit. Whe
abilities.summary: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly Kroot unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: War Leader
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem.
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Root of Honour
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model
abilities.summary: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Kroot unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Kroot Linebreakers
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test
abilities.summary: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Kroot Packmates
abilities.timing: in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly Kroot Infantry unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it
abilities.summary: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly Kroot Infantry unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.summary: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving its attacks.

abilities.summary: Subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for any enemy unit that declares a charge against the bearer’s unit (this is not cumulative with any other reductions to that Charge roll).

abilities.timing: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, unti
abilities.summary: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so

While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.summary: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.summary: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

abilities.summary: The bearer has the TRANSPORT keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 TACTICAL DRONES models.

abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY . That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Outflank

abilities.summary: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

abilities.name: Airborne Agility
abilities.timing: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves
abilities.summary: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.timing: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by mod
abilities.summary:

abilities.summary: The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back, but when doing so only models equipped with this wargear can make ranged attacks.

abilities.summary: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.timing: Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Photon Casters
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Battlesuit Support System
abilities.timing: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
abilities.summary: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Nova Burst
abilities.timing: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until
abilities.summary: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

abilities.name: Weapon Support System
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: GUIDED FIRE
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army (excluding Kroot and Vespid Stingwings units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is wholly within 9" of one or more KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units from your army, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit instead.

stratagems.name: ALIEN EXPERTISE
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If it is a Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced as well.

stratagems.name: MULTISENSORY SCANNING
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If it is a Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: PHEROMONE WAYPOINTS
stratagems.target: One Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: INTERLOCKING MANOUEVRES
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a Transport at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.

stratagems.name: EXPERIMENTAL MODIFICATIONS
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: EXPERIMENTAL WEAPONRY
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you roll one or more dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in your unit, you can re-roll the result.
tags: Experimental Prototype Cadre – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: REACTIVE IMPACT DAMPENERS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
tags: Experimental Prototype Cadre – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: AUTOMATED REPAIR DRONES
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one BATTLESUIT model in your unit: that model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.
tags: Experimental Prototype Cadre – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: NEUROWEB SYSTEM JAMMER
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Crisis unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: THREAT ASSESSMENT ANALYSER
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LETHAL HITS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities to apply to those weapons until the end of the phase.

stratagems.name: EXPERIMENTAL AMMUNITION
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one of the following to apply to your unit until the end of the phase: - Improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. - Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1, and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: COORDINATE TO ENGAGE
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (see For the Greater Good).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: WALL OF MIRRORS
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Stealth, Ghostkeel or Commander Shadowsun unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: POINT-BLANK AMBUSH
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: A TEMPTING TRAP
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time you use this Stratagem, you must also select one objective marker that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone; until the end of the battle, this becomes your Trap objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: PHOTON GRENADES
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Grenades unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: COMBAT EMBARKATION
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge, and one friendly Transport.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can embark within that TRANSPORT . If it does, your opponent can select new targets for that charge.

stratagems.name: A TRAP WELL LAID
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Kroot unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has resolved its attacks this phase, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
tags: Kroot Hunting Pack – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: JOIN THE HUNT
stratagems.target: One Kroot Infantry or Kroot Hounds unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
tags: Kroot Hunting Pack – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: HIDDEN HUNTERS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Kroot unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
tags: Kroot Hunting Pack – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: GUERRILLA WARRIORS
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a Kroot unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That KROOT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge.
tags: Kroot Hunting Pack – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: THE GRISLY FEAST
stratagems.target: One Kroot unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.
tags: Kroot Hunting Pack – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: EMP GRENADES
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy VEHICLE unit is selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.target: One Kroot Grenades unit from your army within 8" of that enemy VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, worsen the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of that enemy VEHICLE unit’s weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: FOCUSED FIRE
stratagems.target: Two T’AU EMPIRE units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1.

stratagems.name: AGGRESSIVE MOBILITY
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: PINPOINT COUNTER-OFFENSIVE
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding Kroot units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: COMBAT DEBARKATION
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: PULSE ONSLAUGHT
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit (excluding Kroot units) from your army that has just shot, and one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: COUNTERFIRE DEFENCE SYSTEMS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: THE ARRO’KON PROTOCOL
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that contains 6 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If that attack targets an enemy unit that contains 11 or more models, it has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

stratagems.name: FAIL-SAFE DETONATOR
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a T’au Empire Battlesuit model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That destroyed model’s unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if that unit was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Before removing your model from play, if it has the Deadly Demise ability, do not roll for that ability; instead, you can choose whether the result of that roll is a 1 or a 6. If your model does not have the Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of it: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: THE TORCHSTAR GAMBIT
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that can FLY whose attacks have been resolved this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, your unit cannot declare a charge this turn

stratagems.name: GRAV-INHIBITOR FIELD
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test and you must roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 6, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: THE SHORTENED BLADE
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: STIMM INJECTORS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

detachment_rules.name: Patient Hunter
detachment_rules.summary: During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T’au Empire models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), each time a ranged attack is made by a model in that unit that targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

detachment_rules.name: Killing Blow
detachment_rules.summary: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T’AU EMPIRE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit, its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

detachment_rules.name: Bonded Heroes
detachment_rules.summary: Each time a T’au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

detachment_rules.name: Hunter’s Instincts
detachment_rules.summary: Each time a Kroot model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target of that attack is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength.

detachment_rules.name: Skirmish Fighters
detachment_rules.summary: Kroot models from your army have a 6+ invulnerable save against melee attacks and a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

detachment_rules.name: KEYWORDS
detachment_rules.summary: If you select this Detachment, Kroot Carnivore units from your army have the Battleline keyword.

detachment_rules.name: Integrated Command Structure
detachment_rules.summary:
Kroot and Vespid Stingwings units from your army have the following ability:
Targeting Triangulation (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 9" of and visible to this unit, each time a ranged attack made by a friendly T’AU EMPIRE model (excluding KROOT , VESPID STINGWINGS and Titanic models) targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
T’au Empire units (excluding KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS units) from your army have the following ability:
Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): While a friendly KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit is wholly within 6" of and visible to this unit, that KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

detachment_rules.name: Superior Craftsmanship
detachment_rules.summary: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by T’AU EMPIRE models from your army

enhancements.name: Internal Grenade Racks
enhancements.summary:
T’au Empire Battlesuit model only. The bearer has the Grenades keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Supernova Launcher
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Borthrod Gland
enhancements.summary:
Kroot Flesh Shaper only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of from the third.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Student of Kauyon
enhancements.summary:
Kroot Shaper model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three Kroot Carnivores or Kroot Farstalkers units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Coordinated Exploitation
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

Points: 40

enhancements.name: Kroothawk Flock
enhancements.summary:
Kroot model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Admired Leader
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model (excluding Kroot models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one KROOT or Vespid Stingwings unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one T’au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Prototype Weapon System
enhancements.summary:
T’au Empire Battlesuit model only. Each time the bearer is selected to shoot, select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the selected ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Mont’ka
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Strategic Conqueror
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model’s Objective Control characteristic.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three T’AU EMPIRE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Points: 30

enhancements.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Nomadic Hunter
enhancements.summary:
Kroot Trail Shaper model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Fanatical Convert
enhancements.summary:
Kroot model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
enhancements.summary:
T’au Empire Battlesuit model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Starflare Ignition System
enhancements.summary:
T’au Empire Battlesuit model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Through Unity, Devastation
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

Points: 40

enhancements.name: Transponder Lock Module
enhancements.summary:
T’au Empire Walker model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly Kroot or Vespid Stingwings units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Root-carved Weapons
enhancements.summary:
Kroot War Shaper model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Fusion Blades
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the [MELTA 4] ability.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Strike Swiftly
enhancements.summary:
T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly T’AU EMPIRE units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

Points: 25
